title: Entry-Level Radiologist at Breach Candy Hospital

jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Radiologist at Breach Candy Hospital
jsonLd.description:
Breach Candy Hospital, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Radiologist for our Amritsar operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Breach Candy Hospital:
Breach Candy Hospital is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Referral bonus program
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Amritsar, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Breach Candy Hospital!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
